name: Supervisor Core V1 Lean
description: Primary error monitoring workflow. Receives errors via Error Trigger, enriches and classifies payloads, sanitizes credentials, handles trigger-node error shapes, self-loop guards before circuit logic, debounces duplicates with burst counts, manages atomic circuit breaker with transition logging, sends HTML Telegram alerts, logs events, and performs safe auto-retry for retryable transient errors.

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO supervisor_events (trace_id, event_type, workflow_name, execution_id, failed_node, severity, status, fingerprint, payload)
VALUES ($1, 'error_self_loop', $2, $3, $4, 'warning', 'suppressed', $5, $6::jsonb)

INSERT INTO supervisor_events (trace_id, event_type, workflow_name, execution_id, failed_node, severity, status, fingerprint, payload)
VALUES ($1, 'error_debounced', $2, $3, $4, 'info', 'suppressed', $5, $6::jsonb)

options.queryReplacement: ={{ $json.traceId }},{{ $json.workflowName }},{{ $json.executionId }},{{ $json.failedNode }},{{ $json.fingerprint }},{{ JSON.stringify({ reason: '30s debounce window', burstSuppressedCount: $json.burstSuppressedCount, category: $json.category }) }}

parameters.query:
=WITH current AS (
  SELECT status, error_count, opened_at
  FROM circuit_state
  WHERE circuit_key = 'supervisor'
  FOR UPDATE
),
upserted AS (
  INSERT INTO circuit_state (circuit_key, status, error_count, last_error_at, updated_at)
  VALUES ('supervisor', 'closed', 1, NOW(), NOW())
  ON CONFLICT (circuit_key) DO UPDATE SET
    error_count = CASE
      WHEN circuit_state.status = 'closed' THEN circuit_state.error_count + 1
      WHEN circuit_state.status = 'half_open' THEN circuit_state.error_count + 1
      ELSE circuit_state.error_count
    END,
    status = CASE
      WHEN circuit_state.status = 'closed' AND circuit_state.error_count + 1 >= 5 THEN 'open'
      WHEN circuit_state.status = 'half_open' THEN 'open'
      ELSE circuit_state.status
    END,
    opened_at = CASE
      WHEN circuit_state.status = 'closed' AND circuit_state.error_count + 1 >= 5 THEN NOW()
      WHEN circuit_state.status = 'half_open' THEN NOW()
      ELSE circuit_state.opened_at
    END,
    last_error_at = NOW(),
    updated_at = NOW()
  RETURNING *
),
transition_log AS (
  INSERT INTO supervisor_events (trace_id, event_type, workflow_name, execution_id, severity, status, fingerprint, payload)
  SELECT
    '{{ $json.traceId.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
    'circuit_transition',
    '{{ $json.workflowName.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
    '{{ $json.executionId.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
    'warning',
    u.status,
    '{{ $json.fingerprint.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
    jsonb_build_object(
      'from', c.status,
      'to', u.status,
      'error_count', u.error_count,
      'workflow_name', '{{ $json.workflowName.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
      'workflow_id', '{{ $json.workflowId.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
      'failed_node', '{{ $json.failedNode.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
      'fingerprint', '{{ $json.fingerprint.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
      'category', '{{ $json.category.replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
    )
  FROM upserted u
  JOIN current c ON TRUE
  WHERE c.status IS NOT NULL AND u.status <> c.status
  RETURNING id
)
SELECT
  u.status,
  u.error_count,
  u.opened_at,
  c.status AS previous_status,
  EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM transition_log) AS transition_logged
FROM upserted u
LEFT JOIN current c ON TRUE

parameters.text: =🔴 CIRCUIT BREAKER OPEN Error Count: {{ $json.error_count }} of 5 Triggered By: {{ $json.workflowName }} → {{ $json.failedNode }} Category: {{ $json.category }} Error: {{ $json.errorMessage.substring(0, 500) }} Trace: {{ $json.traceId }} ⚠️ New errors will be suppressed until the circuit resets.

=INSERT INTO supervisor_events (trace_id, event_type, workflow_name, execution_id, failed_node, severity, status, fingerprint, payload)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.traceId.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  'circuit_breaker',
  '{{ $json.workflowName.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.executionId.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.failedNode.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  'critical',
  'open',
  '{{ $json.fingerprint.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ JSON.stringify({ error_count: $json.error_count, category: $json.category, workflowId: $json.workflowId, reason: 'circuit_opened' }).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::jsonb
)

INSERT INTO supervisor_events (trace_id, event_type, workflow_name, execution_id, failed_node, severity, status, fingerprint, payload)
VALUES ($1, 'error_alert', $2, $3, $4, $5, 'sent', $6, $7::jsonb)

options.queryReplacement: ={{ $json.traceId }},{{ $json.workflowName }},{{ $json.executionId }},{{ $json.failedNode }},{{ $json.severity }},{{ $json.fingerprint }},{{ JSON.stringify({ retryable: $json.retryable, retryOf: $json.retryOf, error_count: $json.error_count, category: $json.category, burstSuppressedCount: $json.burstSuppressedCount, dbError: $json.is_db_error }) }}

parameters.content:
## 🛡️ Supervisor Core V1 Lean
**Error Trigger → Enrich/Classify → Self-Loop Guard → Debounce → Circuit → Alert → Auto-Retry**

- Self-loop guard now runs before debounce/circuit
- Trigger-node error payload fallback included
- Severity + category inference
- Credential sanitization before Telegram and DB
- Circuit transition logging embedded in atomic CTE
- Circuit alert only fires on newly-open transition
- Burst duplicate counter included in alerts
- Auto-retry for transient errors only, guarded by retryOf + fingerprint cooldown
- All failures → standardized staticData cache
